title: alyssum strictum
intro: Alyssum strictum, also known as White Alyssum or Sweet Alyssum, is a perennial plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which are attributed to its saponins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Alyssum strictum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
